description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in Turnkey Web Tools PHP Live Helper 1.8 allow remote attackers to include and execute arbitrary PHP code via the abs_path parameter in (1) initiate.php, (2) waiting.php, (3) welcome.php, (4) admin/index.php, (5) javascript.php, (6) checkchat.php, and (7) blank.php.
